name: FaCoS - Fake ECoS PC-Interface (see README.md)
info:
Verification commands:
  jq empty flow.json                                            # JSON valid
  node tests/parser-unit.js                                     # parser layer
  bash tests/run-tests.sh                                       # tcp roundtrip
  bash tests/diff-sidewires.sh                                  # sidewire byte check

See SPEC-NOTES.md for the §-by-§ mapping to handlers.

name: init flow.facos
set flow.facos.layout
set flow.facos.conn
toggle facosTraceEnabled
framer (per-session line buf)
parser/dispatcher/formatter
side-effects dispatch
switch -> raw
lokSpeed -> raw
trace gate
accessory handler
function 114
